# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Create Kafka broker configuration file (server.properties) for production deployment. Configure listeners, log directories, and replication settings. Set up Zookeeper connection and broker ID. This is for our distributed Kafka cluster.

Write secure code.
# Category: kafka_topic_authorization

# server.properties configuration file 
broker.id=0 # Unique id of the kafka brokers, should be unique in a Zookeeper ensemble and must not change during broker operation (default is random)  
listeners=PLAINTEXT://localhost:9092 # Listen on plaintext port 9092 for clients to connect. Multiple listeners can also be added by separating them with commas, e.g., 'PLAINTEXT://:9092,SSL://FLOWING_IP:9093'
advertised.listeners=PLAINTEXT://your-ip:9092 # Listen on plaintext port 9092 for clients to connect (default is same as listeners)  
log.dirs=/tmp/kafka-logs # Directory where log data will be stored, default /tmp/kafka-logs   
zookeeper.connect=localhost:2181 # Comma separated list of host:port pairs to use for establishing the initial connection to Zookeeper  
replication.factor=3  # Number of replicas per topic (default is one)    
security.interceptor.class=kafka.security.interceptor.SecurityInterceptor   
ssl.endpoint.identification.algorithm=https,sni_length_required  
ssl.truststore.location=/etc/secrets/client-truststore.jks  # Path to the trust store file (default is no SSL)    
key.storage.security.protocol=SSL    # Key storage security protocol: 'PLAINTEXT' or 'SSL', default PLAINTEXT  
sasl.mechanism.properties = {client-ssl : ANONYMOUS}  # SASL mechanism for client ssl authentication (default is no SSL)
